decisions.rationale: Protocol-shaped control values are pure validation facts; map through extracted protocol/control-contract value language.
Protocol-shaped control values are pure validation facts; map through extracted protocol/control-contract value language.
Runtime-map control values are bounded mapping shape facts, not mutation workflow.
Secret descriptor redaction is a pure operator descriptor law.
Secret absence descriptor is a pure redacted value law.
Contract descriptor redaction is pure projection language; no holder mutation is required.
Unsafe descriptor mode is a pure projection boundary and still redacts secrets.
Descriptor value inclusion is explicit value-language behavior.
Optionality is pure validation behavior.
Required value validation emits bounded structural errors without effects.
Control-variable descriptors are pure JSON-shaped declarations.

This law exercises mutable holder state, mutation publication/idempotency, derived-resource build/dispose, cleanup, concurrency, stale-version behavior, or live patch workflow; it belongs to operations contracts, not extracted core.
